title: Proclamation No. 1057, s. 2006
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1057

DECLARING SATURDAY, JUNE 17, 2006, AS SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE PROVINCE OF AGUSAN DEL SUR

WHEREAS , Saturday, June 17, 2006, marks the Foundation Day anniversary of the Province of Agusan del Sur;

WHEREAS , it is but fitting and proper that the people of the Province of Agusan del Sur be given full opportunity to celebrate the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, EDUARDO R. ERMITA , Executive Secretary, by authority of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , do hereby declare Saturday, June 17, 2006, as special (non-working) day in the Province of Agusan del Sur.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 15th day of May, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Six.

By authority of the President: (Sgd.) EDUARDO R. ERMITA Executive Secretary

By the Executive Secretary: (Sgd.) JOAQUIN C. LAGONERA Senior Deputy Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
